name: fid-l-2-3-px
_notes: Fiducial-grid sweep: page=l fiducial=(i=2,j=3,u=0.5,v=0.5) dir=px. Auto-generated by scripts/gen-fiducial-sweep.mjs (see docs/diagnostic-2026-05-14.md). Pair with the analytic heat-map in scripts/fiducial-heatmap.mjs to detect FR-P1 violations that depend on drag-origin location.
